branding.benefitsSubheading: Purpose-built speech recognition for professionals who cannot afford documentation errors.

branding.aboutBody: Voice Recognition Australia has been the trusted Dragon reseller for Australian medical practices, law firms, government agencies and enterprises since 1999. We provide local onboarding, training, and ongoing support - not just a licence key.
branding.howItWorksSubheading: From enquiry to dictating in days - we handle licensing, setup and training locally.
branding.featuresSubheading: Specialist vocabulary, cloud flexibility and enterprise-grade security - built for Australian healthcare and legal workflows.
branding.ctaBody: Tell us about your team and we will recommend the right Dragon product - Medical One, Professional, Anywhere or Legal - with local onboarding and support.
ctaBullets: Your profession or industry (medical, legal, business)
Number of users and deployment environment
branding.footerDisclaimer: Dragon is a registered trademark of Microsoft Corporation. This website is independently operated by Voice Recognition Australia, an authorised Dragon reseller. Not affiliated with or endorsed by Microsoft or Nuance Communications.

benefits.title: Dictate 3x faster than typing
benefits.body: Dragon converts speech to text at up to 160 words per minute with 99% accuracy from first use. Clinicians, lawyers and business professionals reduce documentation time by 50% or more.

benefits.title: Specialist vocabulary built in
benefits.body: Dragon Medical One includes 80+ medical specialty vocabularies. Dragon Legal includes legal terminology. No custom training required - accurate from day one in your professional context.

benefits.title: Cloud or desktop - your choice
benefits.body: Dragon Professional 16 runs fully offline for complete privacy and command control. Dragon Professional Anywhere and Dragon Medical One are cloud-based for anywhere access and automatic updates.

benefits.title: Local Australian support
benefits.body: Voice Recognition Australia has deployed Dragon in Australian medical practices, law firms and government agencies for 25 years. We provide hands-on onboarding, training and ongoing support - in your timezone.

pricing.name: Dragon Professional Anywhere
pricing.priceNote: Per user per year - volume pricing available
features: Ideal for virtual and thin-client environments

tco.heading: Documentation time saved - 10 users over 12 months
tco.note: Based on average 2 hours documentation per day per user. Dragon users commonly report significant reductions in documentation time.

steps.title: Tell us about your team
steps.text: Let us know your profession, number of users, and whether you prefer desktop or cloud. We recommend the right Dragon product for your workflow.

steps.title: Trial and validate
steps.text: We set up a free trial in your environment. For medical teams, we can demonstrate Dragon Medical One with your EHR system.

steps.title: Deploy with local support
steps.text: We handle licensing, installation and onboarding. Your team is dictating faster within days - with ongoing Australian support.

features.title: Dragon Medical One - built for clinicians
features.body: Dragon Medical One is the cloud-based medical speech recognition solution trusted by clinicians worldwide. With 80+ built-in medical specialty vocabularies covering cardiology, radiology, pathology and more, it requires no voice profile training and delivers accurate transcription from day one. Hosted on Microsoft Azure with HIPAA-aligned security.

features.title: Dragon Professional - for business and legal teams
features.body: Dragon Professional 16 and Dragon Professional Anywhere give business and legal professionals the speed and accuracy to eliminate documentation bottlenecks. Custom voice commands, macro automation, full Microsoft 365 integration and centralised team management make Dragon the productivity platform for document-intensive organisations.

faqs.q: What is the difference between Dragon Professional 16 and Dragon Professional Anywhere?
faqs.a: Dragon Professional 16 is a locally installed desktop application - it runs fully offline once activated, ideal for users who need command and control or work in secure environments. Dragon Professional Anywhere is cloud-based, always updated, and ideal for virtual desktops and distributed teams.

faqs.q: Is Dragon Medical One suitable for Australian GPs and specialists?
faqs.a: Yes - Dragon Medical One is used extensively by Australian GPs, specialists, and hospital clinicians. It includes specialty vocabularies for general practice, cardiology, radiology, oncology and many more. Contact us for a demonstration with your specific EHR system.

faqs.q: Does Dragon Medical One integrate with Best Practice or Medical Director?
faqs.a: Dragon Medical One integrates with major Australian clinical software including Best Practice, Medical Director and hospital EHR systems. Contact us to confirm compatibility with your specific setup.

faqs.q: Can I trial Dragon before purchasing?
faqs.a: Yes - free trials are available for Dragon Professional 16 and Dragon Professional Anywhere. For Dragon Medical One, we can arrange a demonstration and trial in your clinical environment. Contact our Australian team to arrange access.

Dragon NaturallySpeaking was the historic product name. The current product range is Dragon Professional (desktop and cloud), Dragon Medical One, and Dragon Legal. All are available through Voice Recognition Australia. We can help you identify which product matches your previous Dragon version.

faqs.q: What support do you provide after purchase?
faqs.a: Voice Recognition Australia provides local Australian onboarding, training and ongoing support. We are based in Australia, available in your timezone, and have 25 years of Dragon deployment experience across medical, legal and enterprise environments.
